all_weather.label: All Weather
all_weather.thesis: Balanced deployment across premium capture, long volatility, and directional books.

theta_harvest.label: Theta Harvest
theta_harvest.thesis: Lean into short premium when tape is orderly and realized volatility stays contained.

bull_trend.label: Bull Trend
bull_trend.thesis: Favor bullish spreads when momentum is positive and panic risk is low.

bear_trend.label: Bear Trend
bear_trend.thesis: Favor bearish spreads and protection when downside momentum builds.

long_vol_breakout.label: Long Vol Breakout
long_vol_breakout.thesis: Prefer convexity and breakout trades when volatility is rising fast.

panic_hedge.label: Panic Hedge
panic_hedge.thesis: Shrink short premium, keep convexity on, and let defense dominate in panic regimes.

mean_reversion.label: Mean Reversion
mean_reversion.thesis: Favor range capture and measured directional fades in choppy, non-trending tapes.

massive_overview.note: Proxy framework focuses on predictive quality. Delay quote analysis and option model suite are theoretical options studies, not full broker-fill backtests.

institutional_robustness.note: Institutional robustness score emphasizes breadth, stability, and execution realism. It is a deployment filter, not a profit guarantee.
